estimateDate.description: Date of estimate expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16598](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16598)

analystId.description: The FactSet Entity Identifier for the analyst making the estimate.

analystName.description: The name of the analyst making the estimate.

brokerId.description: The FactSet Entity Identifier for the broker making the estimate.

brokerName.description: The name of the broker making the estimate.

ratingsNoteText.description:
A textual representation of the analysts rating. Broker recommendations are divided into five main broad categories- **Buy, Overweight, Hold, Underweight, and Sell**.

Additional recommendations may be displayed for the below reasons - * Without- A rating "Without" is displayed when a broker provides estimates but does not provide a rating. * Dropping- When a broker stops covering an equity, the recommendation will show "Dropping." * Not Available- A broker may be "Not Available" due to outstanding circumstances with that particular security. Ratings are not displayed until a new rating is provided. * Most/Least- "Most" or "Least" favorable rating is displayed for top or bottom rating available for a particular security.

requestId.description: Identifier that was used for the request.

inputDateTime.description: Date and time when the data is available at the source.

lastModifiedDate.description: The date at which a broker provided an estimate that is a revision.
